steps.command: wp user create alice_editor alice_editor@example.com --role=editor --first_name=Alice --last_name=Editor --display_name='Alice Editor' --user_pass=password
wp user create bob_author bob_author@example.com --role=author --first_name=Bob --last_name=Author --display_name='Bob Author' --user_pass=password
wp user create carol_contributor carol_contributor@example.com --role=contributor --first_name=Carol --last_name=Contributor --display_name='Carol Contributor' --user_pass=password
wp user create dave_subscriber dave_subscriber@example.com --role=subscriber --first_name=Dave --last_name=Subscriber --display_name='Dave Subscriber' --user_pass=password
wp user create erin_shop erin_shop@example.com --role=subscriber --first_name=Erin --last_name=Shopper --display_name='Erin Shopper' --user_pass=password
